name: Arnold Garcia
awards: Excellence in Client Relations Award, Outstanding VP Achievement
bio: Arnold provides senior operational command across MH Construction, guiding teams from preconstruction through closeout with steady judgment and proven field expertise. His leadership style is practical and mentorship-driven, reinforcing a culture where safety, craftsmanship, and client relationships stay aligned from day one.
careerHighlights: Directs operational execution across field teams and project leadership.
Provides senior mentorship that strengthens superintendent and PM performance.
Maintains safety, quality, and schedule discipline across active missions.
Reinforces relationship-first delivery with consistent client follow-through.
funFact: Arnold believes the standard you leave behind matters more than the title you carry.
certifications: CDL, State Certified Spanish/English Interpreter, Forklifts, Aerial Platforms/Scissor Lifts, CPR/First Aid, Powder Actuated Tools, Procore Certified Admin
